title: Round at the Bar
description: Order a couple of drinks and a snack at a casual bar.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Hey, what can I get started for you?

templates.text: Hi! Could I see the drinks menu, please?
templates.hint_zh: 嗨,可以看一下飲料單嗎?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure thing, here you go. The local IPA is pretty popular tonight.

templates.text: I'll try the IPA. Can I also get a glass of water?
templates.hint_zh: 我試試 IPA,可以再來一杯水嗎?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course. Anything to snack on?

templates.text: Yeah, the fries sound great. With ketchup if you have it.
templates.hint_zh: 好啊,薯條聽起來不錯,有番茄醬的話麻煩附上。

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Coming right up. Want to start a tab or pay as you go?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: All right, just leave me a card. I'll be back with your drinks shortly.
